title: od
html:
od

File Read

Three spaces are added before each character in the read file (wrapped at the specified value, i.e., `999`), and non-printable chars are printed as backslash escape sequences.

od -An -c -w999 /path/to/input-file
excerpt: od File Read Three spaces are added before each character in the read file (wrapped at the specified value, i.e., `999`), and non-printable chars are printed as backslash escape sequences. od -An -c -w999 /path/to/input-file
